column2: Show the realm laws cheat menu.
Hide the realm laws cheat menu.
Steps up to the next Crown Authority level (Min to Low to Medium to High to Max).
Steps down to the previous Crown Authority level (Max to High to Medium to Low to Min).
Sets Investiture to Free (player appoints bishops – vassals with bishops gain opinion – religious head dislikes).
Sets Investiture to Papal (religious head appoints bishops).
Sets Controlled Realm Inheritance to Illegal (vassal titles cannot pass to another realm).
Sets Controlled Realm Inheritance to Free (vassal titles can pass to another realm).
Sets Vassal War Declaration to Allowed (vassals may freely declare war).
Sets Vassal War Declaration to External (vassals may only declare war outside the realm).
Sets Vassal War Declaration to Illegal (vassals may not declare war within or outside the realm).
Steps up to the next Centralization level (Min to Low to Medium to High to Max).
Steps down to the previous Centralization level (Max to High to Medium to Low to Min).
Steps up to the next Tribal Organization level (Min to Low to Medium to High to Max).
Steps down to the previous Tribal Organization level (Max to High to Medium to Low to Min).
Sets Viceroyalty to None (no viceroyalties enabled).
Sets Viceroyalty to Kingdoms (enables Kingdom viceroyalties).
Sets Viceroyalty to Duchies (enables Kingdom and Duchy viceroyalties).
Steps up to the next Status of Women level (Tradition to Marginal to Significant to Notable to Full).
Steps down to the previous Status of Women level (Full to Notable to Significant to Marginal to Tradition).
Sets Revoke Title to None (title revocation forbidden).
Sets Revoke Title to Allowed (vassal title revocation enabled).
Sets Revoke Title to Religious (free infidel revocation).
Sets Administration to Feudal (decentralized feudal administration).
Sets Administration to Late (mid-feudal transitional administration).
Sets Administration to Imperial (centralized imperial bureaucracy).
Sets Crown Authority directly to the highest tier (Max).
Sets Centralization directly to the highest tier (Max).
Sets Tribal Organization directly to the highest tier (Max).
Sets Status of Women directly to the highest tier (Max).
